title: The Deep Purple
writer: Paul Armstrong, Earle Browne, Wilson Mizner
actors: Miriam Cooper, Helen Ware, Vincent Serrano
plot: Two con men, Pop Clark and Harry Leland, take rooms in a small town boardinghouse, where Leland makes love to Doris Moore, a young woman restless to leave her village. Leland convinces Doris to follow the con men to New York City,...
